case_title: CHEUNG, HING WAH vs. WONG, TIMOTHY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, HING WAH AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, TIMOTHY WONG, ALBERT WONG, EVA SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-25-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-25-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-05-1993
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, TIMOTHY WONG, ALBERT WONG, EVA
CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT WONG, TIMOTHY WONG, ALBERT WONG, EVA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHEUNG, HING WAH
ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHEUNG, HING WAH
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-25-1993, CONTINUED TO NOV-08-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ARB-3 SENT OUT; REJECT DATE OF 6/15/93; REC'D NAMES OF RUSSELL S. ROECA, LOUISA M. JASKULSKI, NORMAN HARRIS, JOHN M. DRATH AS ARBITRATORS.
PLAINTIFF REJECTS JOHN M. DRATH AS ARBITRATOR.
CROSS DEFT. CHEUNG REJECTS NORMAN HARRIS AS ARBITRATOR.
DEFENDANT REJECTS LOUISA M. JASKULSKI AS ARBITRATOR.
RUSSELL S. ROECA CHOSEN AS ARBITRATOR BY DEFAULT; ARB-5 SENT OUT; 300 = 10/13/93; SC = 11/16/93.
NOTICE OF ARB. HEARING ON 9/7/93.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY WONG, TIMOTHY, WONG, ALBERT, WONG, EVA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHEUNG, HING WAH
NOTICE OF ARBITRATION HEARING RESCHEDULED TO 08-SEP-93
REC'D PHONE CALL FROM PLTF. AT 2:08 PM THIS DATE SAYING ARB HRG IS SET FOR 9/8 AND CASE HAS JUST SETTLED; ARB HAS BEEN NOTIFIED BUT WITHOUT 48 HOURS NOTICE.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED RE: CASE HAS BEEN SETTLED
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, TIMOTHY WONG, ALBERT WONG, EVA
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-08-1993, CONTINUED TO NOV-16-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-16-1993, OFF CALENDAR OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED 9/30/93.
CASE REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL FILED ON 7/9/93
PHOTOCOPY FOR PUBLIC
